raw_consumer_statement: I have an account in XXXX. I pay it each month as a direct charge to my checking account. My American Express card is being charged {$30.00} by XXXX. I started a XXXX dispute today as the first one was never credited and the charges have continued. I have contacted XXXX and after HOURS they found the duplicate account and I have being charged since XXXX using an American Express card that expired in XXXX. I am frustrated that American Express continued to allow XXXX to charge my account each month with an expired card, refused my first dispute and have caused me to spend hours and hours resolving this issue.
